steps.name: docs-and-ia-reset
steps.summary: Rewrote the IA docs so product management is a top-level domain, inventory is list/history and inbound/outbound centered, settings owns store connections, and legacy 기준 데이터 /integrations ownership is demoted to redirects.

steps.name: navigation-products-and-settings-ownership
steps.summary: Reordered the global nav to keep product management visible, removed the stray settings product-management CTA, and consolidated store-connection ownership inside settings with query-param deep links from legacy routes.
